# m-dev-tools

> Engine-neutral M (MUMPS) developer tools — TDD/CI/lint/fmt/test/coverage
> across YottaDB and InterSystems IRIS. Modeled on Go/Rust/Python toolchains.

## Start here

- [Org catalog (machine-readable)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/m-dev-tools/.github/main/profile/tools.json): per-repo summary + pointer URLs
- [Task index (hand-curated routing)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/m-dev-tools/.github/main/profile/task_index.json): intent → typed ID
- [Schema — tools](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/m-dev-tools/.github/main/profile/tools.schema.json): contract for `tools.json`
- [Schema — task index](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/m-dev-tools/.github/main/profile/task_index.schema.json): contract for `task_index.json`
- [Org README](https://github.com/m-dev-tools/.github/blob/main/profile/README.md): human overview

## Core repositories

- [m-cli](https://github.com/m-dev-tools/m-cli/blob/main/AGENTS.md): canonical `m` CLI surface
- [m-stdlib](https://github.com/m-dev-tools/m-stdlib/blob/main/AGENTS.md): runtime standard library (STD* modules)
- [m-standard](https://github.com/m-dev-tools/m-standard/blob/main/AGENTS.md): language reference data (grammar, tokens)
- [tree-sitter-m](https://github.com/m-dev-tools/tree-sitter-m/blob/main/AGENTS.md): parser / AST

## Agent integration

- [m-dev-tools-mcp](https://github.com/m-dev-tools/m-dev-tools-mcp/blob/main/AGENTS.md): MCP server wrapping this catalog — `route_intent` / `describe` / `verify`

## Guardrails

- Do not invent STD* APIs or `m` subcommands; route the gap to the owning repo.
- Use `m-stdlib` before adding helper logic to `m-cli` or an application.
- For language semantics, query `m-standard`'s TSVs/JSON, not memory.
</content>
</invoke>
